headline: Hantavirus Cruise Cucks 🦠🚢 FLY to Nebraska QUARAN-TEASE 🏨😷!
text:
Seventeen Yankee cruise simps 🇺🇸🛳️ from hantavirus HORROR SHOW 🦠😱 MV Hondius – docked in Spain's Canary CUTIES 🏝️🐦 – got GOVT JET LIMO ✈️👑 to Nebraska's BADASS Biocontainment BAE 🏥🔒! Touchdown Omaha 🏙️📍 at University Med Center's NATIONAL QUARANTINE PAD 🛏️🚫 – the ONLY fed-funded germ JAIL 🏰🦠 opened Nov 2019, right before COVID CHAOS 👻🦇! No gurney drama 😂🚑, Prof John Lowe spilling: 'They WALK off plane 🛣️👟 like hotel VIPs 🥂, straight to neg-pressure suites 💨🚫 with ROOM SERVICE 🍔📱 and workout vibes 🏋️‍♂️💦!' Dr Mike Wadman dropping hotel HYPE 🏨😍: 'Food DELIVERY 🚚🍕, exercise gadgets 📱🏃, daily VIBE CHECKS 👀❤️ – like a SPA vacay but with MASK MANDATES 😷🤐!'

CDC Acting BOSS Jay Bhattacharya 🧑‍⚕️📢 on CNN ☕📺: 'We SCREEN these cruise CRUISERS 👀🦠 – low risk if NO CLOSE CONTACT SMOOCHES 💋🤒 with sympy sickos! Medium/HIGH? Offer NEBS STAY 🏥🍆 or SELF-DRIVE home 🚗😤 sans exposing normies! Then 42-DAY SELF-ISO ORGY 😩⏳ with local health DADDIES 👮‍♂️ monitoring CDC-style!' No tests cuz NO SYMPTOMS 🧪❌ – 'This AIN'T COVID, bby 👶🚫 – hantavirus protocols SLAYED outbreaks before, NO PANIC SIMPING 🤡😱!' Brit Yank tagging along 🇬🇧🇺🇸 for the RIDE 👯‍♂️✈️.

Blue gown GAGGERS 😷🩺 bouffant CAP QUEENS 👩‍🦰🎩 masked UP disembarking Tenerife port 📸🏝️ – among 90+ evac BABES 🛳️💨! Seven US peeps ALREADY HOME 🏠🆓 in GA 🍑, TX 🤠, VA 🌳, AZ 🏜️, CA 🌴 – state depts EYE-BALLING 👁️🦠 for sneaky infections! Risk of BIG OUTBREAK? LOW AF 📉😌 – but if ANYONE SPIKES 🤒🚨, Nebraska BIOCONTAINMENT UNIT awaits 🦠🏥 for high-consequence HOT MESS patients! Officials YEET Covid comps 🚫🦠: 'Hantavirus HARD MODE 🦠💪 – spreads ONLY via SYMPY SNUGGLES 🤗🤒, not air ORGY like Rona!'

Cruise ship from HELL 🚢😈 to Nebraska NEG-PRESSURE PARADISE 🏨🚫 – self-iso SOON in home states 🏠😷 or chill in quarantine HOTEL HEAVEN 🍆📺! No bubble POP like NVDA 🤑🚀, just germ GIGGLES 🦠😂 – passengers DROPPING MIC on panic: 'We're GOOD, fam! 😎✌️' Early Monday ARRIVOS 🌅🛬 – WALK IN, not wheeled OUT! 🥳🚶‍♂️
